### Post by LiterallyDude on 2007-05-11
hi all,

just installed feisty, nvidia driver, and misc software. feisty hangs randomly hangs about a quarter way through booting.

i'm a noob and i don't even know where to begin debugging this thing. thanks in advance. here's my xorg.conf:

### Post by mrmonday on 2007-05-11
I used to have this problem. When your Grub menu comes up (the one whith ubuntu and windows on) use the arrows to navigate to ubuntu (likely the first one one the list). Press 'e' to edit, go down to kernel, press 'e' then remove -splash, and -quiet. Once you have done this, press enter, then b to boot. After lots of text flying past, it will hang in its usual place. Write down what it gets stuck on, and post it here. I think there is a better way of doing this, but I am not sure.

Hope this helps.

---

### Post by LiterallyDude on 2007-05-11
thanks much. i've tried that several times, but for some reason it didn't stall on thos attempts. when it does agiain, i will repost. thanks again. ed

okay... this is where it hangs. anyone have any ideas?

[<c02e0033>] xfrm_state_find +0x4e3/0x570

thanks in advance.

### Post by mrmonday on 2007-05-16
That's a really odd message... Googling it only gives these links:

[https://bugs.launchpad.net/ubuntu/+source/linux-source-2.6.20/+bug/112786](https://bugs.launchpad.net/ubuntu/+source/linux-source-2.6.20/+bug/112786)
[https://bugs.launchpad.net/ubuntu/+source/linux-source-2.6.20/+bug/93230](https://bugs.launchpad.net/ubuntu/+source/linux-source-2.6.20/+bug/93230)
[https://bugs.launchpad.net/ubuntu/+source/linux-source-2.6.20/+bug/107481](https://bugs.launchpad.net/ubuntu/+source/linux-source-2.6.20/+bug/107481)
[https://bugs.launchpad.net/acpi/+bug/93230](https://bugs.launchpad.net/acpi/+bug/93230)

I can not find anything of use in there... You may have more luck.

Using xfrm_state_find as the search criteria is more use, but in the links I looked at, I couldn't find anything. 

Good luck with your problems.
